ResearchProjectDef.label: Simple prosthetic
ResearchProjectDef.description: People have no choice but to replace their lost limbs with prosthetics, crafting body parts from simple materials. This requires not only skilled medical techniques but also exquisite craftsmanship.\n\nUnlock the Jade Prosthetic Series.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Basic talisman
ResearchProjectDef.description: The most basic Grade-Three Artifacts are simple to craft and possess no particularly powerful abilities. As long as one masters the technique of crafting spiritual crystal components, even ordinary people can assemble them with ease.\n\nUnlock Third-rate talismans and the Talisman worktable.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Basic cultivator weapon
ResearchProjectDef.description: By embedding spiritual crystal components into weapons, even the simplest weapons forged from ordinary iron can unleash additional destructive power. Such weapons are favored by common cultivators.\n\nUnlock Third-rate weapon crafting.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Black steel synthetic technology
ResearchProjectDef.description:
Based on advanced Qi studies, cultivators have gained deeper insights into Qi energy, leading to the discovery of techniques that fuse spiritual crystals with steel.

By constructing larger ultra-high-temperature forges and utilizing extreme heat and pressure, they have successfully merged spiritual crystals with steel, creating a unique modern material—Black steel.

Unlock Black steel Synthesis. Unlock Black steel Prosthetic Series.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Forge creation
ResearchProjectDef.description: The cultivators' forging skills have become increasingly refined. They began to explore the microscopic structure of each spirit stone, crafting even sturdier armor, more stable magical tools, and more powerful weapons. No longer content with mere force, they progressively sought the limits of each creation, perfecting the fusion of divine souls with their crafted items.\n\nUnlock second-rate weapons, armor, and talismans.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Basic golem
ResearchProjectDef.description: A group of artifact-refining cultivators took a different path, starting to study how to imbue objects with consciousness. They are known as "Spirit Golem Masters."\n\nUnlock Low-tier Spirit Mechanical Golems.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Modern medicine
ResearchProjectDef.description: Once, medicine was constrained by numerous factors, but with the advancement of advanced Qi studies, new medical technologies were born. The art of immortality is now within reach, but what lies beyond this?\n\nUnlock the Five Elements Organs.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Ancient cultivator restoration
ResearchProjectDef.description: With the wisdom of the ancient cultivators, we have mastered their unique forging and engraving techniques. By combining the resilience of steel with the spirituality of spirit stones, we are able to create artifacts in the style of the ancient cultivators.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Master Of Smithing
ResearchProjectDef.description: On the basis of the ancient cultivator, combined with modern forging technology, we can finally make a modern weapon armor, truly become the master of the Smithing!

ResearchProjectDef.label: Qi-based military science
ResearchProjectDef.description:
Based on modern military technology, the cultivators have refined their craftsmanship and Qi regulation, utilizing spirit stones as an energy source to advance various military weapons.

We have developed a series of weapons with greater destructive power. These automated weapons have completely altered the rules of war, making the enemy hesitate in fear.

Unlock automated turrets.
